topics.title: Scope and Functions of Industrial Engineering - Types of Production (Batch, Flow and Unit)
Roles of Line Supervisors and Production Managers

Product Development and Design: Objectives - Quality and Cost Considerations - Human Factors in Design - Detailed Design and Prototyping - Functionality and Manufacturability - Standardization - Simplification and Variety Reduction - Concurrent Engineering
Plant Layout and Material Handling: Types of Plant Layout - Principles of Material Handling - Material Handling Equipment - Types, Selection and Application
Materials Requirement Planning - Inventory Management: EOQ Models, Discount Models, P System, Q System, Reorder Level - Selective Inventory Control Techniques - JIT - Supply Chain and Management
Lean Manufacturing (LM): Basic Elements - Tools - Concept of Wastes - Stages of 5S and Waste Elimination - Need for LM - Toyota Production System
Agile Manufacturing: Definition, Business Need, Conceptual Framework, Characteristics and Generic Features - Approaches to Enhance Agility in Manufacturing - Managing People in Agile Organization

Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP): Concept of Enterprise, ERP Overview - Integrated Information System - ERP Implementation - Benefits, Challenges, Success and Failure Factors - Business Process Reengineering (BPR)
Quality: Quality Planning, Quality Control, Quality Assurance, Quality Management - TQM, Six Sigma and Quality Circle (Brief Description Only)
Statistical Quality Control - Process Capability - Causes of Variation in Quality - Control Charts for X and R - Acceptance Sampling
Reliability Engineering - Causes of Failures - Bath Tub Curve - System Reliability - Life Testing
